✦ डिजिटल आमंत्रण पत्र ✦
प्रबुद्ध नागरिक संवाद
विकसित भारत @ 2047 का संकल्प
6 June 2026  ·  3:30 PM  ·  Carnival Banquet Hall, Ranchi
सबका साथ  ·  सबका विकास  ·  सबका विश्वास  ·  सबका प्रयास
Shridhar B. Dandin Ji
✓ पंजीकरण स्वीकृत
आदरणीय Shridhar B. Dandin जी, आपको प्रबुद्ध नागरिक संवाद में सादर आमंत्रित किया जाता है। कृपया प्रवेश द्वार पर यह कार्ड प्रस्तुत करें।
प्रतिनिधि विवरण
व्यवसायRegistrar
मोबाइल946095XXXX
ईमेलsb****@sbu.ac.in
उपलब्धियांProf. Shridhar B. Dandin, Registrar, Sarala Birla University, Ranchi, Jharkhand sb.dandin@sbu.ac.in, 9460954512 Hailing from Bagalkot district of Karnataka, Prof. Shridhar B. Dandin completed his Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science from Karnataka University (1993), Master’s degree in Software Systems from BITS-Pilani (2013) and doing research work at SBU-Ranchi in collaboration with INRIA Labs (LIS team) of INSA-Rennes, France. His area of research includes Compact Visualization of Multidimensional Data. Data Structures, Compiler Design, Data Analytics, Python and Object-Oriented Programming are his core areas. Over 32 years of academic and administrative experience he has developed several international collaborations and relationships. Under his guidance more than 110 students successfully completed higher education even leading to PhD and got fruitful placements in France, Bangkok and other parts of the world. He is fellow of IEI, IETE and member of ACM, ISTE. After completing 25 years of service at Birla Institutions, Pilani (Rajasthan), he joined Sarala Birla University, Ranchi, Jharkhand in 2020 as Dean of Engineering and Applied Sciences and presently Registrar at Sarala Birla University, strongly believes in religious ethnicities of India and views that, “global exposure, awareness and adoption with the root of Indian Vedic culture, will make successful managers, engineers and technocrats needed by today’s world.”

● अहस्तांतरणीय (Non-transferable)
प्रवेश पर स्कैन करें
⚠ महत्वपूर्ण निर्देश
१.कृपया 3:30 बजे तक पधारें एवं अपना आसन ग्रहण करें। कार्यक्रम 3:45 बजे प्रारंभ होगा — उसके पश्चात प्रवेश संभव नहीं होगा।
२.यह कार्ड एकल प्रवेश हेतु है — अहस्तांतरणीय।
३.कृपया पहचान पत्र एवं यह आमंत्रण पत्र साथ लाएं।
४.कार्यक्रम स्थल पर समयपालन एवं अनुशासन बनाए रखने की कृपा करें।
यह डिजिटल आमंत्रण पत्र आपके नाम पर पंजीकृत है एवं अहस्तांतरणीय है।
भारत माता की जय
